catalysts.thesis: Director Edward P. Garden made a massive $2M open-market purchase, signaling strong conviction that the recent 27% YTD drop is overdone [5.1.7].
catalysts.catalyst_details: On May 20, 2026, Director Edward P. Garden acquired 57,400 shares at an average price of $34.89, totaling over $2M in a single transaction near 52-week lows.
catalysts.absorption_status: Shares remain depressed near recent lows, indicating the broader market has not yet priced in this heavy insider vote of confidence.
catalysts.recency_proof: SEC Form 4 filing disclosed on May 21, 2026.
catalysts.risk: Continued macroeconomic headwinds in the housing market could suppress short-term margin growth.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Despite the stock being down 27% YTD, a key insider deploying millions implies the sell-off has detached from intrinsic value.

catalysts.thesis: Adient posted a strong margin-driven Q2 profit return, presenting a textbook PEAD value setup following the recent pullback.
catalysts.catalyst_details: Morningstar highlighted ADNT on May 22, 2026, as an undervalued stock that crushed earnings, moving from a net loss to a solid profit on revenue growth.
catalysts.absorption_status: Shares have experienced a pullback to ~$20.84 despite the strong beat, indicating the market is slow to absorb the fundamental margin improvements.
catalysts.prediction_market: 75% probability of closing the valuation gap.
catalysts.recency_proof: Highlighted in Morningstar's undervalued earnings beat list on May 22, 2026.
catalysts.risk: High interest rates and global auto production slowdowns could offset margin gains.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Morningstar analysts explicitly target ADNT as 'still cheap despite impressive earnings beats', pointing to a disconnect between the financial turnaround and the stock price.

catalysts.thesis: Major shareholders continue aggressive accumulation with a $5.7M purchase despite a recent run-up, indicating strong expectations of further upside.
catalysts.catalyst_details: Tether Global Investments Fund acquired 141,464 shares for a total of $5.7M between May 19 and May 21, 2026, at prices up to $41.36.
catalysts.absorption_status: While the stock has been strong, the market tends to underestimate the continuation signal generated by massive insiders buying at 52-week highs.
catalysts.recency_proof: Investing.com Top Insider Buys report published on May 22, 2026.
catalysts.risk: High historical volatility following a 116% run-up over the past year.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Institutional and major shareholders are aggressively adding at $41+ rather than taking profits, implying a significantly higher internal price target.
